title: Chīrāla heat wave
lead: Chīrāla is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +6.83. This extreme event has a Score of 10.0/10, indicating severe conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Chīrāla has brought extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 22.9 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 32%, and wind speed is 22.7 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 These conditions are expected to persist, causing significant disruptions to daily life and various sectors.
conclusion: Implement immediate heat wave mitigation measures to ensure public safety.
